essential_question: Now that you've retaught the weak spot — does it actually hold under a fresh check?
objective: Retake a fresh mastery check across Lessons 11–19, mirroring a MUS Systematic Review, confirm the reteach worked, and honestly reset your mastery rating.

content.prompt: Before we check anything — what specifically did you fix since Session 2? Say it in one sentence.

content.heading: Reread before you retest
content.note: Skim your corrected Session 2 work one more time. Then close it — the next problems are fresh, not a repeat.

content.preview: Next: Lesson 20, Special Right Triangles 45-45-90 — Unit 03 begins.

success_criteria.text: I can correctly solve fresh problems across Lessons 11–19 without help
I can honestly reset my mastery rating using today's evidence, not just how I feel

questions.prompt: (L11) A polygon with 9 sides is called a…
(L13) The circumference of a circle with radius 4, in terms of π, is…
(L16) Find the total surface area of a rectangular solid 2 by 3 by 4.
questions.explain: Add the areas of all three pairs of matching faces, then double.

questions.prompt: (L18) A right triangle has legs 5 and 12. Find the hypotenuse.
Exit: rate your mastery on the lesson you reteached (Emerging / Proficient / Mastered) and say what evidence from today backs that rating up.
